obligation_text: High-risk AI systems shall technically allow for the automatic recording of events (logs) over the lifetime of the system.
scoring_text: Knowledge of AI system logging architecture, including design of automatic event recording mechanisms, log retention over system lifetime, and technical implementation of audit trail capabilities.
_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI system logging architecture, including design of automatic event recording mechanisms, log retention over system lifetime, and technical implementation of audit trail capabilities.
reference_document_element_description: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
comments: EU AI Act Art. 12(1) (obligation) superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-001 is the strongest match (STS: 0.563, cosine: 0.596). Secondary: DG-K-006 (DG, cosine: 0.580), AG-S-006 (AG, cosine: 0.558).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression. Primary method for all elements. Scores the competency_implication text (workforce competency interpretation of the regulatory requirement) against WIDAI KSA statements.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.563). Shared vocabulary: [ai, audit, logging]. EU AI Act competency implication terms [architecture, automatic, capabilities, design, event, implementation] vs WIDAI terms [access, application, controls, defenses, filtering, implement] define the semantic distance.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.895 (P=0.890, R=0.901). Balanced P/R — the 25-word competency implication and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference classification. NLI entailment is systematically low for competency→competency pairs (mean ~0.007) because NLI measures strict logical implication, not semantic relatedness. Primary diagnostic value is in detecting contradiction.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (97.4%). Semantic tension between "Knowledge of AI system logging architecture, including design of automatic event" and "Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses,". Despite STS-based 'Superset of' classification, these concepts may operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.596 ≈ STS 0.563 (gap 0.033). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, audit, logging] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.6%. Shared tokens: [ai, audit, logging]. EU AI Act-only: [architecture, automatic, capabilities, design, event, implementation]. WIDAI-only: [access, application, controls, defenses, filtering, implement].
